title: Generative Model Taxonomies
content:
# Interview Prep: Generative Taxonomies

## Q1: Why does RMSNorm perform faster in training and inference loops than standard LayerNorm?

### Standard Answer
LayerNorm requires calculating both the mean and variance of activation vectors, which requires two passes over the data (mean pass and variance pass). RMSNorm assumes a mean of zero, requiring only a single pass to compute the root mean square, which saves memory bandwidth and GPU core cycles.
